calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Dismissal - No Appearance

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anthony Deichler, Esq. (925-242-1500) Plaintiff/Moving party JESSE PALMER.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JESSE PALMER'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT. The motion to amend is granted. There is a liberal policy in favor of amendment, the proposed claims do not change the tenor of the case, and there is no prejudice given the current trial date. Moreover, defendant's opposition based on the merits of the case (without any evidence) is not a basis to oppose a motion to amend. While a court can deny amendment where a claim fails as a matter of law, the preferred practice is to allow amendment. (See Cal. Casualty Gen. Ins. Co. v. Sup. Crt., 173 Cal.App.3d 274, 280-281 (disapproved on other grounds in Kransco v. American Empire Surplus Lines Ins. Co. (2000) 23 Cal.4th 390.) Order is signed. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/SRB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Set For Trial On Feb-20-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Continued To Mar-22-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
